T0010.title: Promo Abuser
T0010.definition: A term for groups engaged in promotional fraud, commonly known as bonus abusers. This includes demographics such as stay-at-home parents, college students, and part-time workers who actively exploit discounts, coupons, and cashback offers to acquire goods or services at minimal or zero cost by aggregating and leveraging promotional intelligence.
